ew_context: Head and shoulders pattern marking cycle high completion - likely end of corrective rally with resumption of primary downtrend
pattern_desc: Classic head and shoulders with head at 1.3964 and neckline at 1.3610. Clean pattern structure with shoulders at 1.3752 and 1.3713 showing textbook formation
invalidation: Close above 1.3807 on D1 timeframe would break above the stop loss and negate the bearish reversal pattern
market_context: USD weakness on Fed dovish repricing while oil recovery supports CAD, creating bearish pressure on the cross
full_analysis:
## Market Structure & Technical Context

USDCAD has completed a textbook head and shoulders reversal pattern with the head at 1.3964 and clear neckline at 1.3610. The pattern shows excellent symmetry with left shoulder at 1.3752 and right shoulder at 1.3713. Current price at 1.3636 has broken below the neckline, confirming pattern activation and bearish reversal.

RSI at 42.7% shows developing bearish momentum while EMA20 at 1.3676 below EMA50 at 1.3714 confirms the trend has shifted negative. ATR of 0.0063 reflects normal volatility for this major pair.

## Key Levels

- **Resistance**: 1.3610 (broken neckline now resistance), 1.3713 (right shoulder)
- **Support**: 1.3526 (swing low), 1.3256 (measured target from pattern)

## Invalidation Level

Close above 1.3807 on D1 timeframe would exceed the stop loss level and invalidate the head and shoulders pattern.

## Macro & Flow Context

Fed dovish repricing weighs on USD while oil recovery and commodity strength support CAD fundamentals. The laminar flow with momentum alignment confirms controlled bearish pressure building on this cross.
